heading: WhAt's InClUdeD
title: Everything you need.
subtitle: Nothing you don't.

included.title: 3 Meals Daily
included.description: Breakfast, lunch, and dinner throughout the bootcamp
included.richText:
Our culinary program is designed for peak cognitive performance.

  • Customized macros for traders
  • Organic, locally sourced ingredients
  • Unlimited specialty coffee & brain-fuel snacks

included.title: Snacks & Beverages
included.richText: Never hit a mid-session slump. We provide a curated selection of nootropics and hydration solutions to keep your focus sharp during high-volatility windows.

included.title: Shared Stay (Villa/Hotel)
included.richText: A 5-star environment for high-level networking. You'll be staying in a private luxury estate equipped with high-speed fiber optics and dedicated trading floors.

included.title: Group Travel
included.description: Transport from the pre-defined group pickup point
included.richText: Seamless logistics from the moment you arrive at the rendezvous point. Private shuttles and concierge-managed transport for all group excursions.

included.title: 100K Tournament Account
included.description: Live trading account for all participants
included.richText: The ultimate skin in the game. Each participant receives a $100,000 funded account to trade during the bootcamp, with real profit-sharing milestones.

notIncluded.title: Your Travel to Destination
notIncluded.description: Flights, trains, or personal transport to reach the location

notIncluded.title: Extra Food & Dining Out
notIncluded.description: Personal restaurant visits or additional orders

footer: 70–80% of your enrollment fee is directly invested into your stay, food, resources, and opportunities.
